purpose: Authoritative schema reference for the Project Knowledge Index (PKI) at {project_root}/.synapse/knowledge/. Defines manifest.json (master routing index with file/domain/tag/concept indexes), annotations/{hash}.json (deep per-file knowledge: purpose, exports, gotchas, patterns, relationships), domains.json (taxonomy), patterns.json (cross-cutting patterns), and insights/{date}_{slug}.json (post-swarm lessons learned). Establishes cross-schema consistency rules and the content-hash-based staleness model.
gotchas: Annotation filename is the first 8 hex chars of SHA-256(relative_file_path) -- must match manifest hash field exactly
manifest content_hash and annotation content_hash must match for non-stale entries; staleness hook flips stale flag when they diverge
domain_index and tag_index in the manifest are bidirectional inverses of per-file domains/tags -- writes must keep them consistent
Insights index in manifest is FIFO-capped at 50 entries
patterns: Hash-keyed annotation files with central manifest routing
Content-hash-based staleness detection (avoids timestamp false positives)
conventions: Domain and pattern keys are lowercase-hyphenated identifiers (/^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*$/)
queries/ subdirectory is gitignored cache, regenerable from manifest+annotations
Schema version field on every PKI file for forward-compatible migration
